name: HD Ticket - CRM Lookup & Routing
script: # ======================================================== # 1️⃣ الجزء الأول: جلب بيانات الوكالة من الـ CRM # ======================================================== sender_email = doc.raised_by if sender_email: agency_data = frappe.db.get_value( "Agency Contract", {"email": sender_email}, ["pcc_code", "agency_name"], as_dict=True ) if agency_data: doc.pcc = agency_data.pcc_code doc.agency_name = agency_data.agency_name doc.custom_agent_contact = sender_email else: doc.pcc = "Unknown" doc.agency_name = f"Unknown - {sender_email}" # ======================================================== # 2️⃣ الجزء الثاني: نظام التوجيه التلقائي المطور والمعزول بالكامل # ======================================================== subject_text = (doc.subject or "").lower() # Customer Success Team csm_keywords = [ "migration", "data migration", "data transfer", "نقل بيانات", "ترحيل بيانات", "تحويل بيانات", "complaint", "شكوى", "delay", "تأخير", "follow up", "متابعة", "onboarding", "implementation", "training", "تدريب", "setup assistance", "customer success" ] # Finance Team finance_keywords = [ "invoice", "billing", "payment", "refund", "subscription", "renewal", "charge", "overdue", "transaction", "credit", "debit", "فاتورة", "دفع", "اشتراك", "تجديد", "استرداد", "مطالبة مالية", "حسابات", "مالية" ] # Product Team product_keywords = [ "bug", "error", "patch", "feature request", "enhancement", "customization", "development", "integration", "api", "performance", "optimization", "UI", "UX", "خطأ برمجي", "مشكلة بالنظام", "تعديل", "تطوير", "برمجة", "ميزة جديدة", "تكامل" ] # IT Team it_keywords = [ "server", "network", "internet", "printer", "camera", "firewall", "telephony", "3cx", "vpn", "email issue", "wifi", "router", "login", "password", "slow", "crash", "down", "not working", "سيرفر", "شبكة", "انترنت", "طابعة", "كاميرا", "جدار حماية", "سنترال", "فايرول", "راوتر", "واي فاي", "إيميل لا يعمل" ] csm_score = 0 finance_score = 0 product_score = 0 it_score = 0 for keyword in csm_keywords: if keyword in subject_text: csm_score = csm_score + 1 for keyword in finance_keywords: if keyword in subject_text: finance_score = finance_score + 1 for keyword in product_keywords: if keyword in subject_text: product_score = product_score + 1 for keyword in it_keywords: if keyword in subject_text: it_score = it_score + 1 # ترتيب الأولوية عند التعادل priority = ["CSM", "Finance", "Product", "IT"] winner = None highest_score = max(csm_score, finance_score, product_score, it_score) if highest_score > 0: for team in priority: if ( (team == "CSM" and csm_score == highest_score) or (team == "Finance" and finance_score == highest_score) or (team == "Product" and product_score == highest_score) or (team == "IT" and it_score == highest_score) ): winner = team break # تطبيق النتيجة if winner == "CSM": doc.ticket_type = "General Inquiry" doc.agent_group = "Sabre CSM Team" elif winner == "Finance": doc.ticket_type = "Billing Issue" doc.agent_group = "Sabre Finance Team" elif winner == "Product": doc.ticket_type = "Technical Issue" doc.agent_group = "Sabre Product Team" elif winner == "IT": doc.ticket_type = "Technical Issue" doc.agent_group = "Sabre IT Support" else: doc.ticket_type = "General Inquiry" doc.agent_group = "Sabre Frontline Helpdesk" # ======================================================== # 3️⃣ الجزء الثالث: قفل أمان سير العمل # ======================================================== ticket_status = str(doc.get("status") or doc.get("workflow_state") or "").lower() if ticket_status == "resolved" and not doc.custom_subissue: frappe.throw( title="تنبيه نظام الدعم الفني", msg="عذراً! لا يمكن تحويل حالة التذكرة إلى تم الحل (Resolved) إلا بعد تحديد المشكلة الفرعية (Sub-Issue) بدقة لضمان جودة التقارير." )
